answer: \boxed{Maskull accepts Krag’s invitation to Tormance primarily because he craves adventure and escape from his ordinary life, driven by his restless, longing spirit. The mysterious seance and the allure of the unknown—symbolized by the crystal ship and the promise of a new world—further fuel his curiosity and desire for transformation. Additionally, his eventual fate suggests the invitation may have been a preordained or cyclical journey tied to his deeper, self-destructive nature or philosophical destiny.}
